titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Employee Unions and Strikes, Yale University, Records
Employee Unions and Strikes, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday July 15, 2019 at 07:38
Finding aid revision description not supplied.
Finding aid revision description not supplied.

did.unittitle: Employee unions and strikes, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of flyers, news clippings, posters, buttons, and a videotape documenting union organizing activities and labor strikes at Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 36 (YRG 36), Records of Yale labor organizations

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Employee Unions and Strikes, Yale University, Records (RU 105). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transfers and gifts from various offices and individuals, 1984-2019.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of flyers, news clippings, posters, and buttons documenting union organizing activities and labor strikes at Yale University.

subject.part: Universities and colleges -- Employees -- Labor unions

did.unittitle: Transcript of Phil Donahue Show filmed at Yale during Local 34 strike
Transcript from the Phil Donahue Show filmed at Yale during Local 34 strike. Guests: A. Bartlett Giamatti, John Wilhelm, Lucille Dickess
Printed materials and clippings concerning Local 34, Federation of University Employees
Local 35, AFL-CIO-Contract negotiations letter to A. Kingman Brewster
"Agreement between Federation of University Employees, Local No. 35, AFL-CIO and Yale University,"
United Automobile Workers (UAW)--Technical, Office, Professional Department: Union Drive
Strike begins: general literature, organizing material
"Yale and Local 34: Facts on the Current Dispute"
End of the strike: negotiations and settlement
Administration's contract proposal (1984 Apr 18) and repercussions
Report to Yale University by Professors Fiss, Goldstein, & Marshall
"Agreement between Yale University and Local 34, Federation of University Employees,"
Reactions and Opinions of the Yale Community
Pre-union--"Yale Break: A Newspaper by and for Women,"
Yale community opinion on strike issues
Yale community opinion on strike issues
Yale community opinion on strike issues
Yale community opinion, rallies, moratorium information, etc.
Yale community opinion on strike issues
Miscellaneous materials concerning finances and strikes, local 34 and 35 and GESO,
President Richard C. Levin face masks
President Richard C. Levin face masks
Buttons worn by workers and supporters during 1984 strike

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, promotional material, and ephemera documenting faculty and graduate student support of the 1984 Yale University clerical and technical employees strike.
